title: eria hawkesii
intro: Eria hawkesii, also known as Hawkes' Gloriosa, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eria hawkesii include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. Eria hawkesii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
